title: Reediella gracillima
taxonomy: Reediella gracillima is classified as a species of lichenized fungus in the family Graphidaceae. It belongs to the genus Reediella. This species of fungus is a type of crustose lichen, characterized by its flat, crust-like growth habit. Reediella gracillima is typically found growing on rocks and tree trunks in tropical and subtropical regions. The exact classification within the family Graphidaceae may vary depending on the source and ongoing taxonomic research.
